_pnpmOverridesNote: Pin is-generator-function to 1.1.0: 1.1.1+ depends on generator-function@2.x whose exports field (experimental ESM 'module.exports' named export) trips tsx's CJS/ESM interop, breaking require('generator-function') from koa. Upstream: https://github.com/inspect-js/is-generator-function/issues/46 (tsx bug acknowledged, PR #47 not yet merged).
